failLaunchApp: The specified path from 86Box application does not exist. Change settings application
destinationWindowsMessage: You need to download an archive with the 86Box virtual machine program on the link $downloadURL, unzip it to any directory and select 86Box executable file in the Windows system to configurate the location of 86Box executable file.
destinationLinuxMessage: Read the instruction on the link $instructionURL to install the 86Box application on Debian. Then just enter 86Box command to the location of the 86Box executable file.
